caption: Just me, Maya, chasing the last rays of that golden spring sun before heading back to work. The breeze off the lake feels like a private hug and my linen dress is slightly too short for this kind of freedom. If the water was a little shallower, I'd be dipping my toes right now without caring who saw. 🌸☀️ #SpringVibes #TravelDiaries #GoldenHour
